g.title: VMS_QSP
g.text: Vasomotor Symptoms of Menopause (폐경기 혈관운동증상) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
Ovarian Follicle Depletion · HPG-Axis Feedback Loss · KNDy-Neuron Hypertrophy · NKB/NK3R Thermoregulatory Narrowing · Hot Flush/Night-Sweat Generation
NK3R/NK1R antagonists (fezolinetant / elinzanetant) · Hormone therapy (estradiol ± progestogen) · SSRIs/SNRIs (paroxetine/venlafaxine) · Gabapentinoids · Clonidine · Oxybutynin

g.title: cluster_hpg
g.text: 2. HPG-Axis Feedback (GnRH pulse generator → FSH/LH → E2)

g.title: cluster_thermo
g.text: 4. NKB→NK3R Signaling & Median Preoptic (MnPO) Thermoregulatory Center

g.title: cluster_auto
g.text: 5. Sympathetic Effector Arm — Cutaneous Vasodilation & Sweating

g.title: cluster_clinvms
g.text: 6. Clinical VMS Phenotype (Hot Flush · Night Sweats)

g.title: cluster_pk_nk3
g.text: 11. Drug PK/PD — NK3R Antagonist (Fezolinetant) & NK1/3 Dual (Elinzanetant)

g.title: cluster_pk_nonhorm
g.text: 13. Drug PK/PD — Nonhormonal Agents (SSRI/SNRI · Gabapentinoid · α2-agonist)
